case_title: CARLSON, DOUGLAS F. VS BIRMINGHAM BUILDERS, INC.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARLSON, DOUGLAS F. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BIRMINGHAM BUILDERS, INC. $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,040.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARLSON, DOUGLAS F. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BIRMINGHAM BUILDERS, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
APPEAL WAS FILED BY PLTFF CARLSON. DUE TO COMPUTER PROBLEM, THIS WAS ENTERED AS IF DEFD. FILED IT. (IN ORDER TO GENERATE APPELLATE #)
